title: Your ideal client walking through the door
subtitle: A visualisation for aligning with the clients and partners you most want to work with.
excerpt: A short visualisation from Day 46 of the MONEY program. The image is simple: a door opens, and the right person walks through it. You recognise them before they speak.
sourceNotes: Inspired by Day 46 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Door-as-threshold visualisation is a widely-used technique in performance coaching and NLP.

practice.whenToUse: Use in the morning before a day of outreach, pitching, or visibility work.

content.text: A five-minute visualisation from Day 46 of the MONEY program. The image is a door: your ideal client or partner walks through it, and you recognise them before a word is said. The practice trains the mind to hold a clear image of alignment — so the body knows what it is looking for.
Sit comfortably, eyes closed. Take three slow breaths and let the noise of the day go quiet. You are not planning anything yet. You are just about to watch something happen.

Picture yourself in a space that feels like yours — an office, a studio, a meeting room, wherever you do your work. There is a door across the room. It is closed, but the light on the other side tells you someone is about to arrive.

The door opens. Notice the person who walks through. Do not force their appearance — let it come. What do you notice about them? How do they carry themselves? How does the room change when they enter it?
You greet them. The conversation that follows is easy. There is no pitch, no proving, no explaining. There is only clarity: this is exactly the right person, arriving at exactly the right time.
Hold the image for a moment. Let it settle. Then take one breath and notice: this is what alignment feels like. You can come back to this feeling whenever you need to recognise it in real life.
Open your eyes. Take one more breath. Go into your day carrying that image with you.
Inspired by Day 46 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Door-as-threshold imagery is a widely-used technique in performance coaching and NLP.
